creator: sirdice@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 236817
Patch to update libretro-fbneo

Patch should update libretro-fbneo to latest git as of 2022-09-25. Unbreaks it on 13.1 and 13-STABLE. 


git rm files/patch-src_burner_libretro_libretro-common_features_features__cpu.c

Patch file doesn't seem to be needed anymore, it built fine without it. 


Not sure what changed except that the latest finalburnneo was merged recently. 

https://github.com/libretro/FBNeo/commits/master

Tested it with a few roms and seems to work. I was only able to test it on amd64 though.
